title: Charged Explosives
description: Highly Configurable Rectangular Charges that can be used to clear out large areas. Highly server configurable and Redstone Controllable!
body:
Charged Explosives allows you to create a charge which you can configure before placing. Activate with a Right-Click, Redstone Signal or Redstone Torch in your opposite hand! Server owners may configure the mod to control if block drops are destroyed, the maximum width/depth/height of the charge and whether concussive damage occurs.

Have fun!
